testcase.name: test_order_pickup_1_self_pickup_registered

failure.message:
selenium.common.exceptions.ElementClickInterceptedException: Message: element click intercepted: Element
...
is not clickable at point (353, 1010). Other element would receive the click:
(Session info: chrome-headless-shell=126.0.6478.61); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#elementclickinterceptedexception Stacktrace: #0 0x5588617ce6aa #1 0x5588614b10dc #2 0x5588615046c6 #3 0x558861502516 #4 0x5588614ffef7 #5 0x5588614fed2c #6 0x5588614f240f #7 0x558861520872 #8 0x5588614f1d89 #9 0x558861520a3e #10 0x55886153f5c3 #11 0x558861520613 #12 0x5588614f04f7 #13 0x5588614f0e4e #14 0x55886179487b #15 0x558861798921 #16 0x55886178036e #17 0x558861799482 #18 0x558861764ccf #19 0x5588617be0a8 #20 0x5588617be280 #21 0x5588617cd7dc #22 0x7f0902e7e609 start_thread

testcase.failure:
E selenium.common.exceptions.ElementClickInterceptedException: Message: element click intercepted: Element

is not clickable at point (353, 1010). Other element would receive the click:
